title: Phoenix (BFF-1 bulk freighter)

'''''Phoenix''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] that bore a load of [[communications satellite]]s, stolen from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] base on [[Orron III]].

The Imperials attempted to recover the satellites, sending a force of [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] and [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|transports]] to capture the fleeing freighter. However, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], worried about the rumors concerning a new Imperial [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|secret project]], planned to capture some of the Empire's own communication satellites to help them intercept transmissions and dispatched the shuttle ''[[Wilsey]]'' escorted by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] in a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighter]] to [[Ambush of the Phoenix|capture]] the freighter.

Farlander defeated the Imperial forces, allowing the ''Wilsey'' to board and capture the ''Phoenix''. The ''Phoenix'' escaped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] shortly before the arrival of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Intrepid (Imperial I-class)|''Intrepid'']].

A week later, ''Phoenix'' was due to be [[Attack on the Phoenix|recovered]] by the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] ''[[Maximus]]'' in a quiet sector, away from Imperial interests. However, when the ''Maximus'' was delayed, Farlander was sent in a lone [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearhead]] to protect the ''Phoenix'' until the ''Maximus'' arrived. When Farlander emerged from hyperspace, he was surprised to discover the ''Intrepid'' in the area, already launching [[TIE series/Legends|TIE starfighters]] against the ''Phoenix''. Coming under immediate attack, Farlander fought off the TIEs until the ''Maximus'' arrived with the freighter ''[[Ojai]]''. The ''Maximus'' launched [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]] but the [[Intrepid (Imperial I-class)|''Intrepid'']] fled quickly leading the Rebels to wonder if it was suffering from a shortage of pilots or starfighters. The ''[[Ojai]]'' then docked with the ''Phoenix'' to recover the satellites.

The satellites were later deployed by the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Jeffrey]]'' and proved essential in discovering the Death Star I project, intercepting an Imperial transmission and relaying it to the Rebel outpost [[AX-235]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
